title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 374.352 - Compact
text:
374.352.  Compact. — The State of Missouri ratifies, approves, and adopts the following interstate compact: 
(L. 2009 H.B. 577) 
*"This act" (H.B. 577, 2009) contained numerous sections.  Consult Disposition of Sections table for a definitive listing.
